title: Persistence fix applied — SQLite now file-based, not :memory:

suggestion: None — the FEEDBACK.md defect is resolved.

title: Create over-validates: year is required, but spec only requires title and author
evidence: main.go:213-215 validateBook returns 400 when book.Year==0; TestCreateBook_Invalid (main_test.go:101-105) asserts 'missing year' => 400
suggestion: Per R9 only title and author are required; rejecting a book with year omitted/0 deviates from spec. Drop the year check or document it as intentional.
